case_title: TEJAS CAROLINA HOLDINGS, INC. VS SOUTH OF MARKET MERCHANT & INDIVIDUAL LIFESTYLES -

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,731.29 FILED BY TEJAS CAROLINA HOLDINGS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTH OF MARKET MERCHANT & INDIVIDUAL LIFESTYLES - ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
CASE RESERVED FOR 3/28/95 10:30 PM SENT TO THE JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE.
AFFIDAVIT OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF DECLARATION RE MIS REPRESENTATION IN DEFTS DECLARATION UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY SUPPORTING CONTINUANCE OF HEARING.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEJAS CAROLINA HOLDINGS, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOUTH OF MARKET MERCHANT & INDIVIDUAL LIFESTYLES - STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-28-1995, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-28-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
